title: MATANA 25 Premium White Plastic Bowls with Gold Rim, 360ml - Elegant, Sturdy & Reusable - Soup & Dessert Bowls for Weddings, Birthdays, BBQ, Buffets, Catering, Parties
features: PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASSIONS : The capacity of each bowl is 360 ml, making them an ideal size for serving a variety of dishes, such as soup, salad, and desserts. The white color of the bowl provides a clean and elegant appearance that can complement any table setting. These bowls are suitable for a wide range of events, including weddings, birthdays, christenings, Christmas parties, and other special occasions.

STURDY, REUSABLE AND PREMIUM QUALITY : Our bowls are made of high-quality solid plastic material, which is durable and long-lasting. They are reusable and can be used multiple times, making them an eco-friendly option. They can withstand wear and tear and are not prone to breakage, making them a great choice for outdoor events or occasions where glass or ceramic dishes are not practical.

ELEGANT AND CLASSY : The gold rim on these bowls adds a touch of sophistication and class to any table setting. This elegant design makes these bowls a great choice for formal events or dinner parties, where presentation is key. The combination of the white and gold colors gives these bowls a classic and timeless look that can match any decor or theme.

VERSATILE : These bowls are versatile and can be used for a variety of purposes, making them a great addition to any party or gathering. They are perfect for serving salads, desserts, or soups, as well as holding snacks and appetizers. Their size and design make them suitable for a wide range of dishes and can be used to serve both hot and cold items.

HAND WASH ONLY : To ensure that the gold rim on these bowls remains intact and does not get damaged, it is recommended to wash them by hand. This will help to extend their longevity and ensure that they continue to look new for future events. Although they are sturdy and can withstand multiple uses, putting them in a dishwasher may cause damage to the gold rim, which may affect their appearance.
description: Product Description Elegance Redefined Indulge in sophistication with our Plastic White & Gold tableware, ideal for main courses, starters, desserts, and appetizers. Each piece brings an elegant touch to your dining experience. Premium Quality Immerse yourself in quality and durability. Our shatterproof design ensures a premium feel, perfect for all occasions—weddings, birthdays, formal events, or a simple outdoor BBQ or picnic. Versatile Glamour Unleashed From weddings to casual gatherings, our tableware adds glamour effortlessly. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, it's the ideal choice for christenings, Christmas, birthdays, and more. Celebrate in style, anytime, anywhere. Wash and Reuse Our white and gold tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering. Previous page Wedding Make your wedding venue a masterpiece with Matana's stunning tableware collection. Picnic Brighten up your picnic spread with our range of tableware. Party Matana Plates and Bowls bring style, functionality, and elegance to your dining table.
